rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROSIA L. HART REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) The supplement filed on 11/15/23 requests specific amounts of fees, which amounts were not specified in the original petition. Court to determine whether an amendment to the petition and notice is needed. 2) The request for fees by the trustee includes time when her license was suspended. Trustee also requests 4 hours to prepare her timesheets. 3) The request for fees by the attorney includes time spent addressing the non-responsiveness of the trustee. 4) Cash on hand has not been verified. 5) Proposed order was submitted by prior counsel, but should be submitted by current counsel. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THELMA M. THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Keisha Smith's request for dismissal of her petition is on file. The Court is to determine whether to set a status hearing on the close of this estate and to order Austin Thompson, as executor and current personal representative whose resignation was contingent on Keisha Smith's appointment as successor personal presentative, to petition for final distribution, for termination of the estate for lack of assets subject to administration, or for a continuance of administration with a new status report. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LINDA YEE LIN MA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed since the initial hearing in April 2023, and nothing has been filed to show any progress, despite counsel's previous three court appearances: 1) A copy of the most recent remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 2) No bank statement verifying the ending cash balance of the Bank of America account is on file. LRSF 14.34(D). A declaration re retention of the original statement must also be filed. LRSF 14.59(A). 3) The current bond is insufficient based on the personal property on hand and annual gross rental income. 4) Did the petitioner take any IAEA actions reportable under CRC 7.250(a) during this account period? 5) The petition must be amended to request a continuance of administration for a specific period as additional relief sought, unless the estate is ready to petition for final distribution before this accounting can be settled. LRSF 14.35(J)(2). 6) An allegation must be made as to whether there are any assignments or powers of attorney that may affect distribution. LRSF 14.35(J)(1). 7) Is there any record showing time of death of the decedent and her spouse for the purpose of applying Probate Code section 223(b)? 8) Has the same tenant been occupying the estate real property? If so, please explain why rent amounts are different in some months. 9) Has the tenant paid a security deposit? No schedule of liabilities has been filed. 10) Are Anastazya, Annika, and Mattias the only natural descendants of the petitioner? Each minor's age must also be specified. 11) Is the petitioner the only person having legal custody of and residing with each minor descendant within the meaning of CRC 7.51(d)? PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YOUNG JOON CHO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed since the last two appearances in September and November 2023: 1) The probate referee's commission ($1,771) must be paid before the Court can approve final distribution. Please file a copy of a receipt or other proof of payment. 2) An allegation must be made that the petitioner or other beneficiary has advanced sufficient cash (in addition to a $1,500 retainer held by the current attorney) to the estate for payment of the attorneys' fees and costs, or the estate real property must be distributed in kind, subject to a lien securing the attorneys' fees and costs. See Probate Code section 10831(d) and LRSF 14.56. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EMMA CHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed since the initial hearing on 04/24/2023 and counsel's last appearance on 08/28/2023: 1) A proof must be filed to show that the estate cash on hand is fully insured in observance of the FDIC limit or is otherwise held in the form of investment(s) authorized by Probate Code sections 9730 and 10533(a)(2). 2) An original small estate affidavit signed by Denise Chew, together with a certified copy of Jane Leong's death certificate, must be conventionally filed with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed). 3) An original small estate affidavit signed by Robert Yee, Eric Yee, and Debra Yee, together with a certified copy of Cobina Wyatt's death certificate, must be conventionally filed with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed). 4) An original small estate affidavit signed by Valerie Smith, Sharon Chan, and Jeffrey Chan, together with a certified copy of Rose Chan's death certificate, must be conventionally filed with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed). 5) To the extent 1/3 of Cobina Wyatt's separate property interest in this estate passed to her spouse (Theron Wyatt) without administration under section 13500, an additional small estate affidavit signed by Robert Yee, Eric Yee, and Debra Yee, together with a certified copy of Theron Wyatt's death certificate, must be conventionally filed with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed). 6) To the extent 1/3 of Rose Chan's separate property interest in this estate passed to her spouse (Albert Chan) without administration under section 13500, an additional small estate affiavit signed by Valerie Smith, Sharon Chan, and Jeffrey Chan, together with a certified copy of Albert Chan's death certificate, must be conventionally filed with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PHILIP RICHARD WATT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues to be addressed at hearing: no Notice of Petition to Administer Estate or proof of publication for the amended petition have been filed. An amended pleading or an amendment to a pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends. (CRC 7.53(a)) 2. All notices must include language about remote appearances. (LRSF 14.1.C.6) Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDUARDO J FRUCTUOSO JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared: (1) Petition #8 to identify the petitioner's parent who is related to the decedent. The amended petition lists the decedent's parents' info. Need info if the petitioner is the child of Ed, Isabel or another child of the decedent. (2) Petition #5.a.(3)-(4) to be completed re: registered domestic partner. (3) Petition #5.a.(7)-(8) to be completed re: issue of a predeceased child. (4) Re-notice and Re-publication on an "amended" petition is required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSA OSALVO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: *REPOSTED 1/19/2024 at 3:10 pm * Continued to 3/18/2024 (the earliest available date) at the Judicial Officer's instruction after reviewing the file. The procedural issues to be cleared two weeks prior: (1) A copy of the lost will to be provided. It needs to be attached to Petition. Also, a copy of the lost will need to be submitted to the clerk's office for the purpose of admission. (2) Need allegation on the lost will pursuant to Prob. Code PC sec. 8223. (3) Notice of Petition to Administer Estate needs to be served on all persons titled. PC sec. 8110. (4) Petition #5.a.(3)-(4) to be completed re: registered domestic partner (5) Petition #8 to set forth each person's relationship to the decedent. (6) Petition to suggest an appropriate bond amount. While Petition estimates the value of the estate $1,100,000, petition suggests $25,000 bond only. (7) Proposed order must be submitted PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSA OSALVO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: *REPOSTED 1/19/2024 at 3:10 pm * Continued to 3/18/2024 (the earliest available date) at the Judicial Officer's instruction after reviewing the file. The procedural issues to be cleared two weeks prior: (1) Need re-notice. Notice failed to set forth that Petition offers a will to be admitted, in #4. PC sec.8100. CRC 7.50. (2) Need re-publication of the notice. Publication failed to set forth that Petition seeks admission of a will. PC sec. 8120. CRC 7.54. (3) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [JC Form DE-147S] to be filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E. (4) Petition to set forth if the decedent's will is self-proving, in #3.f.(2). (5) Proposed order must be submitted Procedural issues on Will Contest: Proof of service of Summons to Lakhsmi and Jennifer not on file. PC sec. 8250(a). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
